socketserver/BaseServer/address_family.name: address_family
socketserver/BaseServer/address_family.description: The family of protocols to which the server’s socket belongs. Common examples are socket.AF_INET, socket.AF_INET6, and socket.AF_UNIX. Subclass the TCP or UDP server classes in this module with class attribute address_family = AF_INET6 set if you want IPv6 server classes.

socketserver/BaseServer/allow_reuse_addr.name: allow_reuse_address
socketserver/BaseServer/allow_reuse_addr.description: Whether the server will allow the reuse of an address. This defaults to False, and can be set in subclasses to change the policy.

info.excerpt: Whether the server will allow the reuse of an address. This defaults to False, and can be set in subclasses to change the policy.
